public class FenwickTree {

    private int size;

    private int[] tree;

    public FenwickTree(int size) {

        this.size = size;

        tree = new int[size + 1];

    }

    public void update(int index, int delta) {

        index += 1; // 1-based

        while (index <= size) {

            tree[index] += delta;

            index += index & -index;

        }

    }

    public int query(int index) {

        index += 1; // 1-based

        int res = 0;

        while (index > 0) {

            res += tree[index];

            index -= index & -index;

        }

        return res;

    }

    public int rangeQuery(int l, int r) {

        return query(r) - query(l - 1);

    }

}

  end
  
  answer = []

      k = q[3]

      # Update nums and depths
      nums[idx] = val
      depths[idx] = new_d
    end
  end
  
  answer
end
